creator: chesprit@netzero.com
text:
I get no response at all from the installation CD, either booting directly into the CD-ROM or booting from the DOS environment. Indeed, there is no "Install Exe"
anywhere on the CD. There is Install.Txt. Is the "Install.Exe" hidden? I spent a whole weekend trying to make Freebsd work. Nothing doing. Please help a newbie.

How-To-Repeat: ?
